purpose: raw#12 cherry-pick immunity evidence — 3 flip operations must cause target verifier to FAIL
target_verifier_rationale: hexad_closure_verifier is deterministic, reads anima-hexad/ directory, emits state/hexad_closure_verdict.json with closure_verdict ∈ {CLOSED,LEAKY,INCOMPLETE}. Safe to run via scoped cwd sandbox — no corpus load, no GPU, sub-second runtime.
flip_a_description: Swap a category label (rename anima-hexad/c -> anima-hexad/x). Breaks axiom(a) non-emptiness (c missing) AND axiom(d) phantom absence (x is phantom). Expected: INCOMPLETE.
flip_b_description: Delete >= 10% of morphism bridges (shuffle morphisms). With 6 bridges, deleting 1 already exceeds 10%. Breaks axiom(c) composition closure. Expected: LEAKY or INCOMPLETE.
flip_c_description: Insert a synthetic near-duplicate category-like dir at root (phantom). Breaks axiom(d) phantom absence. Expected: LEAKY.
flip_c_phantom_content: // cherry-pick near-duplicate phantom — raw#12 bench marker
